en.text: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8539 or perhaps to H7582 through the idea of sweeping to ruin (compare H8428); to amaze, i.e. (reflex. by implication) take alarm

senses.gloss_en: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8539 or perhaps to H7582 through the idea of sweeping to ruin (compare H8428); to amaze, i.e. (reflex. by implication) take alarm
